weaknesses: Unclear on columnar DBs (e.g., Snowflake usage limited)
improvement_bullets: Architected and maintained robust ETL pipelines in Python and SQL, performing complex schema design, indexing strategies, and query performance tuning to optimize data retrieval speeds.
Managed production-grade data infrastructure, including incident monitoring and serving on on-call rotations to troubleshoot and resolve data quality or pipeline latency issues.
Extracted and integrated data from diverse sources into cloud environments (AWS/GCP), utilizing SQL Server and PostgreSQL stored procedures to automate complex data transformations.
Leveraged AWS ecosystem services, including S3 for data lake storage and Athena for ad-hoc querying, to support scalable, high-performing data solutions.
Collaborated with cross-functional technical teams to translate business requirements into highly efficient, scalable data models in columnar database environments.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Engineer opportunity with OTC Markets Group. I am interested in this opportunity because of the company's reputation for maintaining the high-quality, data-driven market infrastructure that powers the U.S. financial markets. What interests me about working for OTC Markets Group is its commitment to transparency and efficiency through its regulated market model, which inspires me because I am passionate about building the reliable data foundations necessary for informed financial decision-making. I believe my expertise in Python-based ETL development and my advanced SQL performance tuning skills would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my career, I have approached complex data problems with a focus on reliability and automation. In fact, while building the FRED economic pipeline, I designed a dbt star schema that utilized partitioning and clustering to optimize query performance, while simultaneously integrating Great Expectations for automated monitoring and data quality validation. This resulted in a production-grade system that drastically reduced analyst query times and ensured consistent data integrity. Ultimately, I know that the Data Engineer role at OTC Markets Group would allow me to bring my background in scalable pipeline architecture to your IT Infrastructure team. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my production-support skills. During this time, I collaborated with engineers to synchronize data across systems using SQL stored procedures and complex queries, which improved overall data accuracy by 60% and directly supported critical front-end feature development. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my knowledge of AWS services and cloud data warehousing in working on the foundational data ecosystems at OTC Markets Group. I know that my data modeling expertise and technical troubleshooting skills align with what it takes to succeed at the Data Engineer role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
